title: ADR-173 source-truth amendment complete
body: Fragrant Regrowing Root amended ADR-173 only. Added source-authority split: OpenAPI/SDK owns API-shaped contracts, bulk extraction owns API-derived graph data, ontology owns IRIs/classes/predicates/graph semantics. Added raw import policy: no machine-local sibling checkout or manual copy as truth; use a tool-generated pinned Turtle/SHACL snapshot with provenance manifest if repo-local data is needed.
